title: Number of Different Integers in a String
titleCn: 字符串中不同整数的数目

testcases.input: word = "a123bc34d8ef34" Output: 3 Explanation: The three different integers are "123", "34", and "8". Notice that "34" is only counted once.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The three different integers are "123", "34", and "8". Notice that "34" is only counted once.

testcases.input: word = "a1b01c001" Output: 1 Explanation: The three integers "1", "01", and "001" all represent the same integer because the leading zeros are ignored when comparing their decimal values.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The three integers "1", "01", and "001" all represent the same integer because the leading zeros are ignored when comparing their decimal values.
